{{Infobox construct
| name = Akura family cloudship
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Akura family cloudship Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Akura]] family utilizes various cloudships for transportation and large-scale evacuation efforts. These vessels range from massive ships capable of carrying hundreds of tournament guests and servants to smaller models designed for approximately ten passengers. Some versions are characterized by purple clouds, while others appear as sleek vessels that seem smaller than their actual dimensions. The family also employs a fleet of these ships to assist in moving people to safety, though they are subject to specific operational constraints, such as being unable to function within certain security fields and having orders to retreat if a [[Wandering Titan]] is detected. While some cloudships are used for rapid movement, others may be slow when operating in low-[[aura]] environments. The ships can be powered by stored energy or ambient [[vital aura]], and they are used to transport diverse groups, including teams of [[sacred artists]] and refugees.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura]] family possesses a cloudship characterized by a sleek design that makes it appear smaller than its true dimensions. This vessel eventually arrived at [[Sky's Edge]] to facilitate travel. During their departure, [[Lindon]]'s team boarded a small version of the [[Akura]] cloudship. [[Pride]] was responsible for operating the ship's control panel during the journey.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura]] family has a cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura]] cloudship is described as being so sleek that it looks smaller than its actual size.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Akura]] cloudship arrived at [[Sky's Edge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s team loaded onto a small [[Akura]] cloudship to leave.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Pride]] was operating the control panel of a small [[Akura]] cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A flock of venomous presences was approaching an [[Akura]] cloudship.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura]] cloudships might leave if there is a delay.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Akura]] cloudships have stopped taking passengers.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Akura]] cloudships were gone.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
